title: Irreversible Entanglements – “Juntos Vencemos” (Feat. Helado Negro)
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:
A couple weeks ago, Irreversible Entanglements announced their new album Future Present Past and released the singles “Don’t Lose Your Head” and “Vibrate Higher.” Today, the free jazz collective is back with “Juntos Vencemos” featuring Helado Negro. “‘Juntos Vencemos’ means ‘together we overcome’ in Spanish,” the quintet explains, continuing: At one point in our recording…

The post Irreversible Entanglements – “Juntos Vencemos” (Feat. Helado Negro) appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
A couple weeks ago, Irreversible Entanglements announced their new album Future Present Past and released the singles "Don't Lose Your Head" and "Vibrate Higher." Today, the free jazz collective is back with "Juntos Vencemos" featuring Helado Negro.

"'Juntos Vencemos' means 'together we overcome' in Spanish," the quintet explains, continuing: 

At one point in our recording session at Rudy Van Gelder studio, we gathered spontaneously in the center of the main room, collected our percussion and, without plans or fanfare or being told what to do, commenced collaborating in the moment. A moment of trust, listening, and action. Such acts honor the human divinity of togetherness and unity, in order to create a multidimensional healing force beyond the power of singularity. Outside authority, boxes, quotas. What more needs to be said that won’t land the sayer on a watchlist, in a cage, or worse?

Listen below.

Future Present Past is out 3/27 via Impulse!
